note: V11 banner FIX (v11-phase2 branch) — replaced 'iff' with plain 'if' in the lottery exclusion rule (the 'single rule' prefix already conveys the only-if direction; iff read as a typo on the public banner). ALSO restored the shared HIDE NAV / SHOW NAV button on the explorer page: js/nav-toggle.js was missing from sost-explorer.html (45 of 47 section pages had it; the explorer was one of the 2 that didn't). Added the script include before </head>; the auto-injector picks up the existing nav element and exposes the same pulsing red/gold button used on every other section. main was bumped v85 -> v87 in parallel; v11-phase2 jumps v85 -> v88 (skipping v86/v87 which lived on main) to keep the version stream linear. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
